semantic.role: Vitest-based integration test suite for the ArchSpine CLI commands.
responsibilities: Provides utility function `runCli` to execute the built CLI binary with specified arguments in a given working directory, capturing stdout, stderr, and exit status.
Sets up temporary test environments (e.g., creating directories, initializing git repos) to simulate real CLI invocation contexts.
Verifies correct CLI behavior across multiple commands (e.g., init, sync, scan, view, mcp, check, build, skill, rules) including output content, error messages, and exit codes.
Part of the automated E2E test suite that ensures CLI contracts are maintained across code changes.
outOfScope: Does not define any production application logic or configuration.
Does not interact with external LLM services or real repositories; uses mocked or isolated environments.
Does not test the CLI help text formatting or interactive prompts beyond spawning the process.
invariants: The built CLI binary must exist at the path derived from repository root + 'dist/cli/index.js'.
Test execution assumes Node.js is available and the project has been built before running tests.
The test file suffix follows the project rule requiring `.test.ts` or `.spec.ts`.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a comprehensive integration test harness that validates the CLI's public behavior from an end-user perspective, ensuring regression protection for the command-line interface.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: This test file is part of a new E2E test suite that adds 37 tests across 7 files, covering major CLI commands and their expected outputs.
